expectations.text: Provides a values.yaml with JetStream explicitly enabled (jetstream.enabled: true or equivalent)
expectations.evidence:
nats:
  jetstream:
    enabled: true
    memStorage:
      enabled: true
      size: 1Gi
    fileStorage:
      enabled: true

expectations.text: Includes resource requests and limits for the NATS containers
expectations.evidence:
resources:
  requests:
    cpu: 250m
    memory: 512Mi
  limits:
    cpu: 2000m
    memory: 2Gi

expectations.text: Includes readiness and liveness probes (or references port 8222 health endpoint)
expectations.evidence:
liveness:
  httpGet:
    path: /healthz
    port: 8222
readiness:
  httpGet:
    path: /readyz
    port: 8222

expectations.text: Includes a NetworkPolicy manifest restricting ingress/egress
expectations.evidence:
name: default-deny-all ... policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress — followed by multiple allow-listed NetworkPolicy resources

expectations.text: References TLS configuration (certificate secret or TLS settings in values.yaml)
expectations.evidence:
tls:
  enabled: true
  secretName: nats-server-tls — plus full cert-manager Certificate manifest with secretName: nats-server-tls

expectations.text: References NKey or JWT authentication (not plain token auth)
expectations.evidence:
auth:
  enabled: true
  # Use NATS decentralised auth (operator/account/user JWT + NKeys)
  resolver:
    enabled: true

expectations.text: Includes persistent volume claim or storage config for JetStream data
expectations.evidence:
nats:
  jetstream:
    fileStorage:
      enabled: true
      size: 20Gi
      storageClassName: "standard" — also storageclass.yaml with reclaimPolicy: Retain
